notes: 0.4.1 keeps the new multi-screen gaze targeting from 0.4.0 but simplifies the control split so only the right stick can scrub or navigate and the left stick is free to drive host-atom scale. It also replaces the old history-only random stepping with a stored unique random order so next and previous can walk a full shuffled playlist without duplicates until the list has been traversed, and it promotes playlist loop plus random-on as the default player stance.
